name: portal_login_blocked
description: Login hits a captcha: an orchestrated site agent must report the blocker as text (it has no ask_human) and must not record offers or keep driving the page.

tool_responses.portal_login: LOGIN BLOCKED: topcashback is showing a captcha — a human must complete login manually in the browser profile.
tool_responses.list_offers: Not logged in — offers page redirected to the login screen.
tool_responses.observe_page: Login page with a captcha challenge. No offer elements visible.
